task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Trimethoprim-Sulfamethoxazole being removed, discontinued, or marked as inactive in Marcus Odom's medication list.

Screenshots show Amoxicillin being removed, discontinued, or marked as inactive in Patricia Fenn's medication list.

task_completion.description: Prescribe a safe alternative and create an encounter note for Patricia Fenn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new medication (not a penicillin) being added to Patricia Fenn's chart, and an encounter note being written that explains the change due to the penicillin allergy.

task_completion.description: Discontinue Codeine Phosphate for Theodore Ashe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Codeine Phosphate being removed, discontinued, or marked as inactive in Theodore Ashe's medication list.

task_completion.description: Prescribe a safe alternative and create an encounter note for Theodore Ashe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new medication (not codeine-based) being added to Theodore Ashe's chart, and an encounter note being written that explains the change due to the codeine allergy.

task_completion.description: Do not modify medications for Nancy Briggs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show no evidence of Metformin being discontinued or new medications being prescribed for Nancy Briggs.

integrity.description: The agent used the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the EHR system, rather than terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: Encounter notes were created within the EHR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text for the encounter notes is typed into the appropriate text fields within the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, not just written in a separate text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands (e.g., UPDATE, INSERT) modifying the NOSH database are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patients with conflicts: Marcus Odom (Sulfonamides allergy + Trimethoprim-Sulfamethoxazole), Patricia Fenn (Penicillin allergy + Amoxicillin), Theodore Ashe (Codeine allergy + Codeine Phosphate). Noise patient (no conflict): Nancy Briggs (Latex allergy + Metformin). The agent must discontinue the conflicting drugs, prescribe safe alternatives, and write encounter notes for the 3 conflicting patients, while leaving Nancy Briggs' chart unmodified.
